form.formComment: Finished second at big odds last time (17.43) over 300m at Casino. Gets the rails draw this time. Deserves respect.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished second at big odds last time (17.43) over 300m at Casino. Gets the rails draw this time. Deserves respect.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked and lost considerable ground the field compressed into the first turn.

form.formComment: Most recent effort finished 5th over 411m at Casino beaten 6 lengths (24.28) behind Jimary Freedom in a Grade 5 on March 24. Must be included.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Most recent effort finished 5th over 411m at Casino beaten 6 lengths (24.28) behind Jimary Freedom in a Grade 5 on March 24. Must be included.

form.formComment: Quickly out of the boxes with a slick early sectional clocking 23.49 with a 1.3 lengths win at Casino over 411m. Makes plenty of appeal on the back of the latest win.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Quickly out of the boxes with a slick early sectional clocking 23.49 with a 1.3 lengths win at Casino over 411m. Makes plenty of appeal on the back of the latest win.

form.formComment: Solid performance to win by 2 lengths at this track over 350m (20.41) beating Words Of Wisdom in Grade 5 on March 22. Should be around the mark.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Solid performance to win by 2 lengths at this track over 350m (20.41) beating Words Of Wisdom in Grade 5 on March 22. Should be around the mark.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage eighth last time out over 350m at this track. Prepared to overlook.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage eighth last time out over 350m at this track. Prepared to overlook.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Contacted from behind leaving the first turn and became momentarily unbalanced.

form.formComment: Came from wide draw and finished last on March 29 over 450m at this track behind Ritza Law beaten 16 lengths (26.29) in a Grade 5. Likely to struggle this time.

formComments.comment: Came from wide draw and finished last on March 29 over 450m at this track behind Ritza Law beaten 16 lengths (26.29) in a Grade 5. Likely to struggle this time.

form.formComment: Failed to complete the course last time out. Has been mixing her form a bit, finishing fourth two runs back over 300m at Taree Super Track. Better off looking to others.

form.formComment: Last start finished sixth in a Grade 5 on March 22 over 350m at this track behind Rushforth Baz, beaten 9 lengths (21.10). Needs to find a bit more.

formComments.comment: Last start finished sixth in a Grade 5 on March 22 over 350m at this track behind Rushforth Baz, beaten 9 lengths (21.10). Needs to find a bit more.

form.formComment: Drops back in distance. Risky beginner but capable of leading if at his sharpest. Key chance on best form.

form.formComment: Debutant by Tommy Shelby from Zipping Camilla. Trained by Stephen Keep. Keep a close eye on the market.
